agent_analysis:
## ELEVATED — Thursday Position Monitor

### GOOGL CALL | +90% | 🟢 TAKE PROFIT
Up 90% against a 15% Thursday target. This is 6x target. Charm is irrelevant — the move already happened. Holding into Friday for the last 10% is textbook greed with expiring options. **Close now.**

### AMZN CALL | +17% | 🟢 TAKE PROFIT
Barely clearing the 15% day-4 target. Stock only +1.1% — this option is surviving on residual extrinsic value that evaporates overnight. By tomorrow morning, theta alone eats ~4-5% of remaining premium. The risk/reward of holding for a 10% Friday target while theta accelerates is negative EV. **Close now.**

### AMD CALL | -12% | 🟡 WARNING
Stock flat at +0.0% — the directional thesis (call) has not confirmed after 4 days. With 0.35 entry delta, charm decay over 4 days likely puts effective delta near ~0.15-0.18. Tomorrow this option needs AMD to gap up meaningfully just to break even, fighting both theta (~4-5%/day) and continued charm erosion. Not yet at -50% hard stop, but recovery probability is low.

At -12% and accelerating decay, holding into Friday risks sliding toward -40% to -50% by close for a slim chance at breakeven. **Close now to preserve capital.**

---

## RECOMMENDATION

**Close all three positions today.**

GOOGL and AMZN are wins — book them. AMD is a slow bleed with no catalyst and a dead thesis — cut it before theta acceleration tomorrow turns -12% into -40%. Net portfolio result: solidly profitable week. Don't let Thursday's gains become Friday's regrets.
